description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs on the default runner image and provides a postgres:14.8 service, with a global variable POSTGRES_HOST_AUTH_METHOD set to trust. Define a before_script that prints the Python version, creates a virtual environment with python3 -m venv venv, activates it, and installs the CI requirements from the custom index using pip3 install -r requirements/ci.txt -i https://pypi.kbsoftware.co.uk/kb/dev/+simple/. Add a test job (in the default test stage) that inherits the before_script, then exports DATABASE_HOST=postgres, DATABASE_PASS=, DATABASE_PORT=, DATABASE_USER=postgres, DOMAIN=dev, LOG_FOLDER=, LOG_SUFFIX=dev, MAIL_TEMPLATE_TYPE="sparkpost", MAILGUN_SERVER_NAME=test.net, MANDRILL_API_KEY="abc", MANDRILL_USER_NAME="def", SPARKPOST_API_KEY="sparkpost_api_key_test", STRIPE_PUBLISH_KEY="pk_test", STRIPE_SECRET_KEY="sk_test", TEST_EMAIL_ADDRESS_1="test@pkimber.net", TEST_EMAIL_ADDRESS_2="test@pkimber.net", USE_OPENID_CONNECT=False, and finally runs pytest --create-db --cov-report term --cov=mail. The pipeline does not define any caches, artifacts, or conditional rules.
